# SSH 执行远程命令
# 替换 YOUR_HOST / YOUR_PASSWORD 为实际值后运行
#
# 执行 hostname
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "cmd", "cmd": "hostname"}
aitk SSH_7b22686f7374223a2022594f55525f484f5354222c2022706f7274223a2032322c202275736572223a2022726f6f74222c202270617373776f7264223a2022594f55525f50415353574f5244222c2022616374696f6e223a2022636d64222c2022636d64223a2022686f73746e616d65227d

# 执行 uname -a
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "cmd", "cmd": "uname -a"}
aitk SSH_7b22686f7374223a2022594f55525f484f5354222c2022706f7274223a2032322c202275736572223a2022726f6f74222c202270617373776f7264223a2022594f55525f50415353574f5244222c2022616374696f6e223a2022636d64222c2022636d64223a2022756e616d65202d61227d

# 查看磁盘使用
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "cmd", "cmd": "df -h /"}
aitk SSH_7b22686f7374223a2022594f55525f484f5354222c2022706f7274223a2032322c202275736572223a2022726f6f74222c202270617373776f7264223a2022594f55525f50415353574f5244222c2022616374696f6e223a2022636d64222c2022636d64223a20226466202d68202f227d
